channel.title: Posts on Hirozy's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Hirozy's Blog

item.title: Do not go gentle into that good night
item.description: Dylan Thomas, 1914 - 1953 Do not go gentle into that good night, Old age should burn and rave at close of day; Rage, rage against the dying of the light. Though wise men at their end know dark is right, Because their words had forked no lightning they Do not go gentle into that good night. Good men, the last wave by, crying how bright Their frail deeds might have danced in a green bay,
